variables.name: APP_NAME
variables.description: API service display name.

variables.name: APP_VERSION
variables.description: API service display version.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Primary SQL database DSN.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_TARGET_HOST
variables.description: Temporal frontend host:port.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_NAMESPACE
variables.description: Temporal namespace.

variables.name: TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE
variables.description: Temporal task queue name.

variables.name: SQLITE_STATE_PATH
variables.description: API reads pipeline step state from this SQLite DB.

variables.name: SQLITE_PATH
variables.description: Worker SQLite state DB path.

variables.name: PIPELINE_WORKSPACE_DIR
variables.description: Worker workspace directory.

variables.name: PIPELINE_ARTIFACT_ROOT
variables.description: Pipeline artifact output root.

variables.name: NOTIFICATION_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable outbound notification delivery.

variables.name: RESEND_API_KEY
variables.description: Resend API key, required when notifications are enabled.

variables.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
variables.description: Resend sender address, required when notifications are enabled.

variables.name: VD_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Base URL for API HTTP calls.

variables.name: VD_API_TIMEOUT_SEC
variables.description: MCP upstream HTTP timeout seconds.

variables.name: VD_API_KEY
variables.description: Optional bearer token for MCP -> API requests.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Public API URL for web bundle/runtime.

variables.name: RSSHUB_BASE_URL
variables.description: RSSHub base URL for feed normalization.

variables.name: FEED_URLS
variables.description: Comma-separated feed URLs.

variables.name: FEED_PATHS
variables.description: Comma-separated feed paths resolved against RSSHUB_BASE_URL.

variables.name: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: HTTP request timeout in seconds.

variables.name: REQUEST_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Retry attempts for RSS/API requests.

variables.name: REQUEST_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Retry backoff base seconds.

variables.name: COMMENTS_TOP_N
variables.description: Maximum top-level comments fetched.

variables.name: COMMENTS_REPLIES_PER_COMMENT
variables.description: Replies fetched per top-level comment.

variables.name: COMMENTS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Comment API timeout seconds.

variables.name: LOCK_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: SQLite lock TTL seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_ATTEMPTS
variables.description: Pipeline step retry attempts.

variables.name: PIPELINE_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS
variables.description: Pipeline retry backoff seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Subprocess timeout seconds.

variables.name: BILIBILI_DOWNLOADER
variables.description: Bilibili download provider strategy: auto | yt-dlp | bbdown.

variables.name: BILIBILI_COOKIE
variables.description: Optional bilibili cookie header used to reduce anti-crawl failures (e.g. code -352).

variables.name: YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable YouTube transcript API fallback when subtitle files are unavailable.

variables.name: ASR_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable local ASR fallback when subtitles/transcript fallback are unavailable.

variables.name: ASR_MODEL_SIZE
variables.description: Default local ASR model size.

variables.name: PIPELINE_MAX_FRAMES
variables.description: Max frames extracted for multimodal inputs; also caps Gemini frame parts for media resolution.

variables.name: PIPELINE_FRAME_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Frame extraction interval seconds.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_INPUT_MODE
variables.description: Gemini media resolution strategy (auto|text|video_text|frames_text).

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_INCLUDE_FRAMES
variables.description: Optional override to force frame context inclusion/exclusion in LLM prompts.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_HARD_REQUIRED
variables.description: When true, llm_outline/llm_digest failures are treated as hard failures.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_FAIL_ON_PROVIDER_ERROR
variables.description: When true, provider/API errors in LLM steps fail the job rather than degrade.

variables.name: PIPELINE_LLM_MAX_RETRIES
variables.description: Optional retry override for llm_outline and llm_digest steps.

variables.name: DIGEST_TEMPLATE_PATH
variables.description: Custom digest template path.

variables.name: DIGEST_LOCAL_TIMEZONE
variables.description: IANA timezone used by DailyDigestWorkflow scheduling.

variables.name: DIGEST_DAILY_LOCAL_HOUR
variables.description: Local-hour trigger for daily digest scheduling.

variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
variables.description: Gemini API key.

variables.name: GEMINI_MODEL
variables.description: Default Gemini model for Gemini-only LLM pipeline.

variables.name: GEMINI_OUTLINE_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model for llm_outline structured generation.

variables.name: GEMINI_DIGEST_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model for llm_digest structured generation.

variables.name: GEMINI_FAST_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini model used when llm.speed_priority=true and no model override is provided.

variables.name: GEMINI_EMBEDDING_MODEL
variables.description: Gemini embedding model entrypoint for retrieval/vectorization integrations.

variables.name: GEMINI_THINKING_LEVEL
variables.description: Default Gemini thinking level (minimal|low|medium|high) for outline/digest generation.

variables.name: GEMINI_INCLUDE_THOUGHTS
variables.description: Whether Gemini may emit thought summaries; keep false for strict JSON consumers.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable Gemini context caching for long text prompts.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: TTL for Gemini cached content in seconds.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_MIN_CHARS
variables.description: Prompt length threshold to enable Gemini context caching.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_MAX_KEYS
variables.description: Maximum in-process Gemini cache key entries before LRU eviction.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_LOCAL_TTL_SECONDS
variables.description: In-process TTL for cached Gemini content references.

variables.name: GEMINI_CONTEXT_CACHE_SWEEP_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Sweep interval for pruning expired Gemini cache entries.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable Gemini computer-use mode in worker runtime.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_REQUIRE_CONFIRMATION
variables.description: Require explicit confirmation before Gemini computer-use actions.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_MAX_STEPS
variables.description: Maximum Gemini computer-use steps per run.

variables.name: GEMINI_COMPUTER_USE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for Gemini computer-use actions.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_API_KEY
variables.description: YouTube Data API key for comments.

variables.name: DIGEST_CHANNEL
variables.description: Daily digest channel.

variables.name: DIGEST_DRY_RUN
variables.description: Daily digest dry-run toggle.

variables.name: DIGEST_FORCE
variables.description: Daily digest force-send toggle.

variables.name: DIGEST_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable fallback send path for daily digest.

variables.name: DIGEST_TO_EMAIL
variables.description: Override digest recipient.

variables.name: DIGEST_DATE
variables.description: Digest date override (YYYY-MM-DD).

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Live smoke API base URL override. Parent-shell value has priority over .env-loaded values.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_API_PORT
variables.description: Fallback API port for live smoke when base URL is not explicitly provided.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_HEALTH_PATH
variables.description: Health endpoint path used by live smoke API preflight check.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
variables.description: Timeout seconds for provider canary run in live smoke script.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_REQUIRE_API
variables.description: When true, fail live smoke if API is not reachable; otherwise skip.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_POLL_INTERVAL_SECONDS
variables.description: Polling interval seconds used while waiting for live smoke jobs to reach terminal status.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_STRICT
variables.description: Strict mode toggle for computer_use smoke scenario. When true, missing or failed command is treated as failure.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP
variables.description: Skip computer_use smoke scenario when true.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP_REASON
variables.description: Mandatory reason when LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_SKIP is enabled.

variables.name: LIVE_SMOKE_COMPUTER_USE_CMD
variables.description: Optional shell command override for computer_use smoke scenario; defaults to scripts/smoke_computer_use_local.sh.

variables.name: YOUTUBE_SMOKE_URL
variables.description: YouTube URL used by live smoke process scenario.

variables.name: BILIBILI_SMOKE_URL
variables.description: Bilibili URL used by live smoke process scenario.

variables.name: FAILURE_CHANNEL
variables.description: Failure alert channel.

variables.name: FAILURE_LOOKBACK_HOURS
variables.description: Failure alert lookback window.

variables.name: FAILURE_LIMIT
variables.description: Maximum failed jobs to include.

variables.name: FAILURE_DRY_RUN
variables.description: Failure alert dry-run toggle.

variables.name: FAILURE_FORCE
variables.description: Failure alert force-send toggle.

variables.name: FAILURE_FALLBACK_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable fallback path for failure alerts.

variables.name: FAILURE_TO_EMAIL
variables.description: Override failure alert recipient.

variables.name: NOTIFY_TO_EMAIL
variables.description: Shared local default recipient for script overrides.

variables.name: API_APP
variables.description: Uvicorn app import path.

variables.name: API_HOST
variables.description: API listen host.

variables.name: API_PORT
variables.description: API listen port.

variables.name: WORKER_DIR
variables.description: Worker module root.

variables.name: WORKER_ENTRY
variables.description: Worker Python entry module.

variables.name: WORKER_COMMAND
variables.description: Worker command for the entry module.

variables.name: DEV_WORKER_SHOW_HINTS
variables.description: Print environment hints before worker startup.

variables.name: MCP_DIR
variables.description: MCP server root directory.

variables.name: MCP_ENTRY
variables.description: MCP Python entry module.

variables.name: OUTPUT_PATH
variables.description: Generated local env template path.

variables.name: INIT_ENV_FORCE
variables.description: Overwrite generated template when set to truthy.

variables.name: WEB_BASE_URL
variables.description: Target URL for web E2E smoke tests.

variables.name: WEB_E2E_EXPECT_TEXT
variables.description: Expected response text for web E2E smoke tests.
